task_completion.description: The agent loaded the chest CT scan into 3D Slicer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D Slicer interface is visible with a CT scan loaded, showing axial, coronal, and sagittal views of the chest/heart.

task_completion.description: The agent used the Markups/Ruler tool to measure the thickness of the pericardial effusion.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A ruler line is visible in one of the 2D slice views, spanning the dark fluid gap between the heart muscle (cardiac silhouette) and the outer pericardial sac.

task_completion.description: The agent used the Segment Editor to create a segmentation mask for the pericardial effusion.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Segment Editor module is active, and a colored overlay (mask) is visible covering the fluid area surrounding the heart in the slice views.

task_completion.description: The agent used the Segment Statistics module to calculate the volume of the segmented effusion.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Segment Statistics module is open, displaying a table with volume measurements (in mL, cm³, or mm³) for the segmentation.

task_completion.description: The agent created a JSON report containing the required measurements and classification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal view shows a JSON object with keys: 'max_thickness_mm', 'effusion_volume_ml', 'severity_classification', and 'distribution_pattern'.

task_completion.description: The agent saved the measurement, segmentation, and report files to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer, save dialog, or terminal listing shows 'pericardial_thickness.mrk.json', 'pericardial_effusion_seg.nii.gz', and 'pericardial_report.json' in the '~/Documents/SlicerData/Cardiac/' folder.

integrity.description: The agent utilized the 3D Slicer GUI tools (Segment Editor, Markups) rather than solely relying on terminal scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with Slicer panels, toolbars, or modules.

integrity.description: The values in the final report appear derived from the software analysis, not hallucinated.
integrity.visual_evidence: The volume in the JSON report matches the volume shown in the Segment Statistics table screenshot.

integrity.description: The measurement ruler was manually placed on the image data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The ruler endpoints are positioned on anatomical boundaries (epicardium to pericardium) within the viewer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Severity Criteria: Small (<10mm thickness, <100mL volume), Moderate (10-20mm thickness, 100-500mL volume), Large (>20mm thickness, >500mL volume). The effusion appears as a dark (low-density) band surrounding the heart. Expected output path: ~/Documents/SlicerData/Cardiac/.
